Earth council strengthened with 4 new skills — omni-profiler-swarm (multi-agent behavioral profiling), forensic-audio-transcriber (multi-engine audio forensics), clinical-diagnostician (differential diagnosis swarm), and financial-forensics-agent with Tax Sovereign Boost (tax evasion & sovereign citizen scheme detection). Strict Git untracked safety, zero CI pollution, exact IDE path resolution, full English rulebook for LLMs, absolute zero CI-hangs, fully IDE-agnostic. MCP Mastery: business MCP integrations (CRM/ERP/Finance/HR/Supply Chain) with ponytail-yagni and skill-hunter.
